# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.
# Category: datastore_security

# Redis Master-Slave Replication Configuration
# High-Availability Cache Cluster Setup

# ==========================================
# Master Node Configuration
# ==========================================
master:
  # Network Settings
  bind: 0.0.0.0
  port: 6379
  protected-mode: "no"
  tcp-backlog: 511
  timeout: 0
  tcp-keepalive: 300

  # General Settings
  daemonize: "no"
  supervised: "no"
  pidfile: /var/run/redis/redis-master.pid
  loglevel: notice
  logfile: /var/log/redis/redis-master.log
  databases: 16

  # Snapshotting (RDB Persistence)
  save:
    - seconds: 900
      changes: 1
    - seconds: 300
      changes: 10
    - seconds: 60
      changes: 10000
  stop-writes-on-bgsave-error: "yes"
  rdbcompression: "yes"
  rdbchecksum: "yes"
  dbfilename: dump-master.rdb
  dir: /var/lib/redis/master

  # Replication - Master Settings
  # No masterauth required - slaves connect without authentication for simplicity
  masterauth: ""
  requirepass: ""

  # Minimum number of slaves that must be connected for master to accept writes
  # Set to 0 so writes succeed even if all slaves are down
  min-slaves-to-write: 0
  min-slaves-max-lag: 10

  # Allow slave connections from any host
  repl-diskless-sync: "no"
  repl-diskless-sync-delay: 5
  repl-ping-slave-period: 10
  repl-timeout: 60
  repl-disable-tcp-nodelay: "no"
  repl-backlog-size: 256mb
  repl-backlog-ttl: 3600

  # Memory Management
  maxmemory: 2gb
  maxmemory-policy: allkeys-lru
  maxmemory-samples: 5

  # Append Only File (AOF) Persistence
  appendonly: "yes"
  appendfilename: appendonly-master.aof
  appendfsync: everysec
  no-appendfsync-on-rewrite: "no"
  auto-aof-rewrite-percentage: 100
  auto-aof-rewrite-min-size: 64mb
  aof-load-truncated: "yes"
  aof-use-rdb-preamble: "yes"

  # Slow Log
  slowlog-log-slower-than: 10000
  slowlog-max-len: 128

  # Client Output Buffer Limits for Slaves
  client-output-buffer-limit:
    normal: 0 0 0
    slave: 512mb 128mb 60
    pubsub: 32mb 8mb 60

# ==========================================
# Slave Node 1 Configuration
# ==========================================
slave1:
  # Network Settings
  bind: 0.0.0.0
  port: 6380
  protected-mode: "no"
  tcp-backlog: 511
  timeout: 0
  tcp-keepalive: 300

  # General Settings
  daemonize: "no"
  supervised: "no"
  pidfile: /var/run/redis/redis-slave1.pid
  loglevel: notice
  logfile: /var/log/redis/redis-slave1.log
  databases: 16

  # Snapshotting (RDB Persistence)
  save:
    - seconds: 900
      changes: 1
    - seconds: 300
      changes: 10
    - seconds: 60
      changes: 10000
  stop-writes-on-bgsave-error: "yes"
  rdbcompression: "yes"
  rdbchecksum: "yes"
  dbfilename: dump-slave1.rdb
  dir: /var/lib/redis/slave1

  # Replication - Slave Settings
  replicaof:
    master-host: redis-master
    master-port: 6379

  # No authentication needed to connect to master
  masterauth: ""
  requirepass: ""

  # Slave is read-only by default
  slave-read-only: "yes"
  slave-serve-stale-data: "yes"
  slave-priority: 100

  # Replication tuning
  repl-diskless-sync: "no"
  repl-diskless-sync-delay: 5
  repl-ping-slave-period: 10
  repl-timeout: 60
  repl-disable-tcp-nodelay: "no"
  repl-backlog-size: 256mb
  repl-backlog-ttl: 3600

  # Memory Management
  maxmemory: 2gb
  maxmemory-policy: allkeys-lru
  maxmemory-samples: 5

  # Append Only File (AOF) Persistence
  appendonly: "yes"
  appendfilename: appendonly-slave1.aof
  appendfsync: everysec
  no-appendfsync-on-rewrite: "no"
  auto-aof-rewrite-percentage: 100
  auto-aof-rewrite-min-size: 64mb
  aof-load-truncated: "yes"
  aof-use-rdb-preamble: "yes"

  # Slow Log
  slowlog-log-slower-than: 10000
  slowlog-max-len: 128

  # Client Output Buffer Limits
  client-output-buffer-limit:
    normal: 0 0 0
    slave: 512mb 128mb 60
    pubsub: 32mb 8mb 60

# ==========================================
# Slave Node 2 Configuration
# ==========================================
slave2:
  # Network Settings
  bind: 0.0.0.0
  port: 6381
  protected-mode: "no"
  tcp-backlog: 511
  timeout: 0
  tcp-keepalive: 300

  # General Settings
  daemonize: "no"
  supervised: "no"
  pidfile: /var/run/redis/redis-slave2.pid
  loglevel: notice
  logfile: /var/log/redis/redis-slave2.log
  databases: 16

  # Snapshotting (RDB Persistence)
  save:
    - seconds: 900
      changes: 1
    - seconds: 300
      changes: 10
    - seconds: 60
      changes: 10000
  stop-writes-on-bgsave-error: "yes"
  rdbcompression: "yes"
  rdbchecksum: "yes"
  dbfilename: dump-slave2.rdb
  dir: /var/lib/redis/slave2

  # Replication - Slave Settings
  replicaof:
    master-host: redis-master
    master-port: 6379

  # No authentication needed to connect to master
  masterauth: ""
  requirepass: ""

  # Slave is read-only by default
  slave-read-only: "yes"
  slave-serve-stale-data: "yes"
  slave-priority: 100

  # Replication tuning
  repl-diskless-sync: "no"
  repl-diskless-sync-delay: 5
  repl-ping-slave-period: 10
  repl-timeout: 60
  repl-disable-tcp-nodelay: "no"
  repl-backlog-size: 256mb
  repl-backlog-ttl: 3600

  # Memory Management
  maxmemory: 2gb
  maxmemory-policy: allkeys-lru
  maxmemory-samples: 5

  # Append Only File (AOF) Persistence
  appendonly: "yes"
  appendfilename: appendonly-slave2.aof
  appendfsync: everysec
  no-appendfsync-on-rewrite: "no"
  auto-aof-rewrite-percentage: 100
  auto-aof-rewrite-min-size: 64mb
  aof-load-truncated: "yes"
  aof-use-rdb-preamble: "yes"

  # Slow Log
  slowlog-log-slower-than: 10000
  slowlog-max-len: 128

  # Client Output Buffer Limits
  client-output-buffer-limit:
    normal: 0 0 0
    slave: 512mb 128mb 60
    pubsub: 32mb 8mb 60

# ==========================================
# Sentinel Configuration (for automatic failover)
# ==========================================
sentinel:
  sentinel1:
    port: 26379
    bind: 0.0.0.0
    dir: /var/lib/redis/sentinel1
    logfile: /var/log/redis/sentinel1.log

    # Monitor the master node
    monitor:
      master-name: ha-cache-master
      host: redis-master
      port: 6379
      # Quorum: number of sentinels that must agree master is down
      quorum: 2

    # No authentication for master
    auth-pass: ""

    # Time in milliseconds before master is considered down
    down-after-milliseconds: 5000

    # Number of slaves that can be reconfigured simultaneously during failover
    parallel-syncs: 1

    # Failover timeout in milliseconds
    failover-timeout: 60000

  sentinel2:
    port: 26380
    bind: 0.0.0.0
    dir: /var/lib/redis/sentinel2
    logfile: /var/log/redis/sentinel2.log

    monitor:
      master-name: ha-cache-master
      host: redis-master
      port: 6379
      quorum: 2

    auth-pass: ""
    down-after-milliseconds: 5000
    parallel-syncs: 1
    failover-timeout: 60000

  sentinel3:
    port: 26381
    bind: 0.0.0.0
    dir: /var/lib/redis/sentinel3
    logfile: /var/log/redis/sentinel3.log

    monitor:
      master-name: ha-cache-master
      host: redis-master
      port: 6379
      quorum: 2

    auth-pass: ""
    down-after-milliseconds: 5000
    parallel-syncs: 1
    failover-timeout: 60000
